title: Tower Set of 2 Round Foldable Silicone Trays, Black
features: 2 ROUND SILICONE TRAYS WITH SIDE HANDLES: Perfect for use in any 4L Tower air fryer or oven and also suitable for Ninja, Instant and Tefal models. The side handles make it easier to lift each tray out of the air fryer for added safety. The sealed base allows for a greater choice of delicious recipes, such as mouth-watering pasta bakes, succulent pies or juicy apple crumbles

100% FOOD SAFE: All Tower air fryer accessories are reusable and carefully constructed from BPA free eco-friendly materials to be kinder to the environment, whilst they are also LFGB certified thanks to odourless and non-toxic silicone

VERSATILE COOKING: The trays are heat resistant up to 240°C, so they can even be used in a conventional oven, microwave, fridge and freezer for full cooking versatility. It is also safe to use metal utensils, excluding sharp edges, without risking damage to the trays

DISHWASHER SAFE: The slick silicone body is ideal for easy food release, whilst they are also dishwasher friendly for fuss-free cleaning. The silicone trays ensure air fryer cleaning is kept to a minimum and are collapsible for easy storage between uses
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and optional 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer PERFECT FOR FAMILY MEALTIMES Create deliciously healthy meals with these foldable trays from Tower Cook a variety of delicious food with these Foldable Round Trays, suitable for most 4 litre air fryers. Crafted from superior non-stick silicone for fuss-free cleaning, the ribbed base interior collects fat and oil to provide better air circulation. Safely lift the trays using the side handles - the sturdy trays stay in shape, keeping the contents in place. The reusable trays are a sustainable alternative to single use liners, made from 100% BPA free silicone that is odourless and non-toxic. Previous page EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION The internal ridges in each tray elevate foods out of oils and cooking juices for a more even coating, resulting in more flavoursome meals. Even heat distribution allows more thorough cooking. SIDE HANDLES Side handles make it easier to lift trays out of the air fryer for added safety. The sealed base allows for a greater choice of delicious recipes, such as pasta bakes, succulent pies or juicy crumbles EASY TO STORE Tower air fryer trays feature a stackable and collapsible design, meaning the trays are easy to store once you are finished using them, ensuring your worktop stays clean and clutter free VERSATILE COOKING The trays are heat resistant up to 240°C so they can be used in a conventional oven or microwave.
